Online reading edition

The English Qur’an

A clear, faithful and modern presentation of the manuscript, arranged for easy online reading. The translator name appears at the top, each surah opens with Arabic first, and the English translation follows beneath.

114surahs included
6236verses in the manuscript data
Arabic + Englishreading layout in one file
Browse
Home

Welcome

Select any surah from the left to open the reader. Arabic loads first for the selected surah, and the English translation from your manuscript appears beneath it. You can also open the manuscript sections, including the preface, introduction, glossary, and thematic master index.

This is a single-file website. You only need one file named index.html for GitHub Pages.
